entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop being studied for yield and drought tolerance

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which is reduced by drought stress

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The yield of the non-grain part of the plant

entities.name: YIELD STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of grain yield across different environments

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress during the reproductive stage that reduces yield

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: An approach used to identify genomic regions associated with specific traits

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to maintain productivity under water-limited conditions

entities.name: WATER-LIMITED ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by insufficient water availability

entities.name: GENOMIC REGIONS
entities.description: Specific areas of the genome associated with enhanced drought tolerance

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT-STRESS
entities.description: Drought stress occurring during the flowering and grain-filling stages

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUP 2
entities.description: The specific genomic location where a QTL for grain yield was mapped

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass productivity

entities.name: BIOMASS PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The total organic matter produced by the plant

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSS TRANSFER
entities.description: A technique used to transfer selected QTLs to elite parents for crop improvement
